businessSummary.oneLiner: Southeast Asia's largest internet platform — Shopee (e-commerce), SeaMoney (fintech), Garena (gaming) triple axis
businessSummary.description: Sea Limited is a Southeast Asian, Latin American, and global consumer internet company operating Shopee (e-commerce), SeaMoney (digital finance), and Garena (gaming). FY2025 revenue $22.94B (+36.4% YoY), net income $1.58B (+255%). Q4 revenue $6.85B. Friday close $86.00 (+0.99%). Post-Q4 earnings Shopee outlook disappointment caused -32% YTD plunge, but attempting rebound from 52-week low of $77.05 (3/3). Strong Buy consensus at $179.54 (+109%). Forward P/E 20.23x. Market cap $50.66B.
howTheyMakeMoney: E-commerce (Shopee): SE Asia's #1 marketplace — GMV commissions, advertising, logistics (~64% of revenue)
Fintech (SeaMoney): SPayLater, SeaBank — lending, payments, insurance (~21% of revenue)
Gaming (Garena): Free Fire — global battle royale, in-game purchases (~15% of revenue)

keyMetrics.name: P/E (TTM)
keyMetrics.interpretation: Reflects +255% net income growth. Reasonable among SE Asian platforms

keyMetrics.name: Forward P/E
keyMetrics.interpretation: Attractive vs growth rate. Discount to MercadoLibre

keyMetrics.name: Q4 Revenue
keyMetrics.interpretation: All-time high. But logistics costs +43.2% raise concerns

keyMetrics.name: Operating Margin
keyMetrics.interpretation: Reinvestment strategy pressuring margins. Long-term expansion expected

growthDrivers.title: Shopee GMV +25% Guidance — Logistics & Fulfillment Reinvestment
growthDrivers.description: TipRanks (3/8): 2026 Shopee GMV +25% YoY guidance. Targeting 2x fulfillment penetration rate. VIP program Brazil expansion.

growthDrivers.title: FY2025 Net Income +255% — Profitability Dramatically Proven
growthDrivers.description: Net income $1.58B (vs FY2024 $0.44B, +255%). Revenue $22.94B (+36.4%). Shopee and SeaMoney dual growth.

growthDrivers.title: Near 52-Week Low — Analysts Strong Buy at $179.54 (+109%)
growthDrivers.description: StockAnalysis: All 11 analysts at Strong Buy. Average target $179.54. Recovery expected from post-earnings overselling.

growthDrivers.title: Forward P/E 20.23x — Historically Undervalued vs Growth
growthDrivers.description: +36% revenue growth at Forward P/E 20.23x. Lowest valuation level among SE Asian internet platforms.

competitiveAdvantage.summary: SE Asia's largest e-commerce (Shopee) + fintech (SeaMoney) + gaming (Garena) triangular ecosystem. 'Amazon of the East' positioning.

moats.description: Shopee leads SE Asia by GMV. Building own logistics network.
700M SE Asian population, LatAm expansion. Young digital native market.

competitors.name: Lazada (Alibaba)
competitors.detail: SE Asia e-commerce #2. Alibaba reducing investment

competitors.name: TikTok Shop
competitors.detail: Social commerce offensive. Rapidly penetrating SE Asia

competitors.name: Grab Holdings
competitors.detail: SE Asian super app. Fintech competition

recentNews.headline: SE stock rebounds +7.58% — Post-earnings oversold recovery
recentNews.significance: StocksToTrade: Despite record Q4 revenue, -32% drop prompts rebound. Market reassessing logistics cost overreaction.

recentNews.headline: Sea doubles annual earnings, yet profitability worries drag shares in worst drop in 2 years
recentNews.significance: Fortune: FY2025 net income +255% but Shopee logistics costs +43.2% raise concerns. Largest single-day drop in 2 years.

recentNews.headline: Q4 & FY2025 results — Revenue $22.94B (+36.4%), net income $1.58B (+255%)
recentNews.significance: BusinessWire: All-time record results. Shopee GMV +25% guidance issued. Logistics reinvestment strategy announced.

recentNews.headline: Logistics + Brazil reinvestment — 'Short-term pain, long-term growth' strategy
recentNews.significance: Simply Wall St: Expanding fulfillment network reinvestment. Responding to TikTok Shop and MercadoLibre competition. Market overreaction analysis.

recentNews.headline: SE down -18% after record 2025 results — What changed?
recentNews.significance: Yahoo Finance: Record 2025 results but Shopee margin pressure and flat EBITDA guidance triggered selling. Undervaluation argument.

analystOpinions.notableComment: StockAnalysis: All 11 Strong Buy consensus, target $179.54 (+109%). Barclays: Target cut $226→$120 but still Buy. Seeking Alpha: Strong Buy $136 YE26.

risks.title: Shopee logistics costs +43.2% surge — Margin pressure
risks.description: Fortune: Q4 Shopee revenue +35.8% but logistics costs +43.2%. Fulfillment expansion costs hurting short-term profitability.

risks.title: TikTok Shop competition intensifying — SE Asian social commerce offensive
risks.description: TikTok Shop rapidly gaining market share in SE Asia. Direct threat to Shopee's core market.

risks.title: YTD -32% plunge — Investor sentiment deteriorated
risks.description: Post-Q4 earnings largest single-day drop. Momentum investor exit + institutional position adjustment.

risks.title: Brazil competition — MercadoLibre home advantage
risks.description: MercadoLibre competition in LatAm expansion. Inferior brand recognition vs local player.

risks.title: Share dilution +5.54% YoY — Per-share value dilution
risks.description: Ongoing share issuance diluting existing shareholders. Limiting per-share earnings growth.

buyReasons.title: Forward P/E 20.23x — Historically undervalued at 36% growth
buyReasons.rationale: SE Asian internet leader priced at value stock valuation, not growth. Result of market overreaction.

buyReasons.title: Near 52-week low — Analyst targets show +109% upside
buyReasons.rationale: All 11 analysts Strong Buy. $179.54 target. Post-earnings selloff creating extreme disconnect.

buyReasons.title: FY2025 net income +255% — Profitability proven
buyReasons.rationale: From losses to $1.58B net income. Business model profitability confirmed.

buyReasons.title: 700M SE Asian population — Structural growth market
buyReasons.rationale: Young digital native population. E-commerce and fintech penetration in early stages.

overallOpinion: Sea Limited delivered all-time record results (revenue +36.4%, net income +255%) yet plunged -32% YTD on Shopee logistics cost concerns. Market appears to have overreacted.
Forward P/E 20.23x with all analysts at Strong Buy (target $179.54, +109%) suggests extreme undervaluation. RSI 33 in oversold territory. Technical rebound expected near 52-week low of $77.05.

Logistics reinvestment is a 'short-term pain, long-term growth' strategy. TikTok Shop competition is a risk, but Shopee's logistics infrastructure and triangular ecosystem differentiate. Current price appears an attractive entry point.

threads.hook: SE record earnings but -32% crash 😱 Oversold bargain?
threads.text: Revenue $23B (+36%), net income +255%. But Shopee logistics +43% tanked the stock. Forward P/E 20x, target $179 (+109%). RSI 33 oversold. Time to buy? 🔗 investory.kro.kr/stock/SE/analysis/2026-03-14
